title: Pledgor's liability prohibited
doc_html:
§1803.  Pledgor's liability prohibited

A pledgor shall have no obligation to redeem pledged things or make any payment on any pawn transaction.

Acts 1993, No. 391, §1, eff. Sept. 1, 1993.
